title: eriocereus regelii
intro: Eriocereus regelii, also known as the Pincushion Cactus, is a species of cactus native to Mexico and Central America, characterized by its dense, globular shape and vibrant yellow flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. Eriocereus regelii has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues, offering health benefits like accelerated wound healing, reduced inflammation, and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of Eriocereus regelii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
